title: ATD - All The Dimensions
description: A mod pack containing all of dimension mods.
body:
# All the Dimensions

**All the Dimensions** is a modpack built upon [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), with a carefully curated selection of additional optimization tweaks, configuration adjustments, and practical utility mods.  
**All the Dimensions** 是一個基於 [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) 打造的模組包，精心加入了額外的效能優化模組、設定調整與實用模組。  

This pack focuses on expanding exploration with dimension-related mods that are fully compatible with the current Minecraft version and mod loader.  
此模組包著重於透過多維度相關模組擴展探索體驗，並確保與當前 Minecraft 版本及模組載入器完全相容。  

---

## ✨ Features  
## ✨ 特點  

- Based on **Simply Optimized** for performance and stability  
  基於 **Simply Optimized**，以確保效能與穩定性。  

- Additional optimization mods and config tuning for smoother gameplay  
  透過額外的優化模組與設定微調，提供更流暢的遊戲體驗。  

- Practical utilities to enhance exploration and convenience  
  加入多種實用模組，提升探索與便利性。  

- A wide variety of **dimension mods** for players who love exploring new worlds  
  為喜愛探索新世界的玩家準備了多款**維度模組**，帶來豐富的冒險體驗。  

---

## ⚠️ Important Notes  
## ⚠️ 注意事項  

- Every mod version included has been selected for **maximum compatibility**  
  所有模組版本皆經過精心挑選，以確保**最佳相容性**。  

- **Do not update individual mods manually**  
  **請勿手動更新模組包內的任何單一模組。**  

- Please wait for full pack updates — we will not provide support for save file corruption or issues caused by unauthorized mod updates  
  請等待整合包的官方更新 —— 任何擅自更新模組導致的存檔損壞或遊戲崩潰問題，**原作者概不負責。**  

---

## ⌨️ Common Hotkeys  
## ⌨️ 常用快捷鍵  

<details>
<summary>Click to expand / 點擊展開</summary>

- **":"** — Tweakeroo: Free Camera mode  
  **「:」** — Tweakeroo：靈魂出竅  

- **"G"** — Tweakeroo: Gamma Override  
  **「G」** — Tweakeroo：伽馬覆寫  

- **"O"** — Open Shader Pack selection menu  
  **「O」** — 打開光影包選單  

- **"="** — Reload currently active Iris shader  
  **「=」** — 重新載入當前啟用的 Iris 光影  

- **"K"** — Toggle shaders on/off  
  **「K」** — 快速開啟或關閉光影  

- **Caps Lock** — Toggle flight mode for Ad Astra Jet Suit  
  **「Caps Lock」** — 切換 Ad Astra 噴射裝甲的飛行模式  

- **F7** — Take screenshot in legacy TGA format (~1.8GB, viewable in paint.net) (1.20.1 Fabric Only)  
  **「F7」** — 以舊版 TGA 格式截圖（約 1.8GB，可用 paint.net 開啟）（僅適用於 1.20.1 Fabric 版本）  

- **"M"** — Toggle Xaero's Minimap  
  **「M」** — 開啟或關閉小地圖  

- **"Y"** — Open model selection menu (Yes Steve Model)  
  **「Y」** — 開啟模型選擇選單（Yes Steve Model 模組）  

- **"R"** — Open model animation wheel (Yes Steve Model)  
  **「R」** — 開啟模型動作選單（Yes Steve Model 模組）  

- **"C"** — Hold to zoom (OptiFine-style zoom)  
  **「C」** — 按住以縮放畫面（類似 OptiFine 的縮放功能）  

</details>
